---
title: "Quercus"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)

## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Cork Oak](/trees/species/cork-oak.html) | 2 | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
| [English Oak](/trees/species/english-oak.html) | 27 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Holm Oak](/trees/species/holm-oak.html) | 4 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
